name: Onramper
description: Fiat-to-crypto on-ramp aggregator API routing across 30+ providers for optimal fees and success rates.

seo.title: Onramper — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Onramper: Fiat-to-crypto on-ramp aggregator API routing across 30+ providers for optimal fees and success rates.

when_to_use: Routing fiat-to-crypto conversions through best-rate provider
Embedding multi-provider on-ramp widget for Web3 apps
Optimizing success rates by switching providers at checkout
KYC-compliant fiat on-ramp for DeFi onboarding flows

pros: Useful fallback when primary providers fail
cons: Adds another layer in the stack
review.verdict: Smart aggregator layer for crypto ramps — adopts the complexity so your wallet or dApp doesn't have to.
review.best_for: Web3 wallets and dApps wanting resilient fiat ramps without juggling providers
review.not_for: Teams wanting direct provider relationships or full branding control

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
